nodes.label: Market Intelligence Engine — Automated collection & analysis of:   1) Institutio
Scrape quarterly shareholding pattern from Screener.in.     Returns list of dict
Store shareholding data in DB (upsert by symbol + quarter_date).
Get stored shareholding history for a stock.
Analyze FII/DII trends from stored shareholding history.     Returns insights li
Scrape key financial ratios from Screener.in for a single stock.     Returns dic
Collect and compare fundamentals for a stock vs its sector peers.     Returns di
Store peer comparison snapshot in DB.
Get stored peer comparison for a stock.
Analyze historical volume data to find seasonal patterns.     Uses stock_prices
Run all data collectors for a given symbol.
Run intelligence collection for all watchlist stocks.
